Iksar Hide Boots  
 

Lore Item
Slot: FEET
AC: 10
STR: +5 CHA: +3 AGI: +5 HP: +25
Focus: Affliction Haste II
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item
Slot: FEET
AC: 10
STR: +5 CHA: +3 AGI: +5 HP: +25
Focus: Affliction Haste II
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Appearance:Kunark Chain

Rarity: Common

# Feb 05 2009 at 3:57 AM Rating: Decent

23 posts
i got them yesterday from a froglok ilis knight in the jail area too, it seems that this froggy killed a jailed iksar ! =)p
▲ Page top
Stupid question...?
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2003 at 10:48 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1652660341379
758 posts
I have a question that might be stupid...but why make an item with an effect that is good only to level 44 and have the item be in the 50ish MOB range...? Seems kind of nuts to me...
▲ Page top
RE: Stupid question...?
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2003 at 7:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591787656221
47 posts
At 44 becomes perm...before it's a random.
▲ Page top
RE: Stupid question...?
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2004 at 9:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761103769
Scholar
37 posts
No, the effect only works with spells up to level 44. It will not affect spells above level 44.

As the first poster mentioned, it makes little sense to put this effect on an item only available to people that will probably have little use for it.
▲ Page top
RE: Stupid question...?
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2004 at 5:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966781719
1 post
Well, with everyone and his brother twinked to some extent these days (guilty), does it really matter?

price
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2002 at 8:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252732034
14 posts
got these for 4k which is reasonable considering that monk quest shoes are better. then i'll sell'em. i offered 5k and guy said 4k is good enough. anything is to much
▲ Page top
Great for Monks I say
QuoteReply
# Oct 22 2001 at 12:00 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249986862
8 posts
I have a Monk on the Tribunal server and he is wearing a pair of these. I am Iksar but am I not considered evil to begin with? The stats are just cherry and the wt on them does not cause problems for me. W/O bags my wt is under 10lbs and with it goes up to 11(tinks n large soiled). You just are going to have a hard time finding better in the price range. I usually see them sell on this server for 4 to 6k but yours could be different. Just my opinion.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 06 2001 at 1:52 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) bah if there wre4e boots made of my woodelf guild master that were this good ide wear em and the fact that they rr poaching iksars for there hide now that makes me mad kill the elf (except m,e u will have a hard time downing me) s save the iksars. im lizard perso )
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 23 2001 at 3:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i am currently selling a pair on xev ..if you are interested send a tell to Rukariz ..looking for cash but will consider trades
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 30 2001 at 7:28 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I dont like these things and will never wear it even if someone gave them to me. Cant imagin anyone wearing anything made out of Iksar hide. Well they are good glove wich prooves that even our hide is better than any oter races.
buy

casters realm's prices are not at ALL accurate... they are just submissions by people who usually wanna either sell or buy a certain item ... kazooie is right.. on cazic thule these fit in the 10-15k range...
